revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Category see also if exists/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Category see also if exists/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_see_also_if_exists%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use| 24000 }} {{lua|Module:See also if exists}} Displays a "see also" link to one or more categories, ''if the category exists''. If none of the supplied categories exists, the template does nothing. It allows the creation of links to categories which do not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether a target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category}}''' : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists | category1 | category2 | category3 | ...}}''' '''Parameters:''' * At least one category name ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 in Spain}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} → {{Category see also if exists|1997 deaths on Planet Zxcvbmm}} # A set of categories, some of which exist:
{{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} → {{Category see also if exists | Poland | | Spain | asdfghij | Dinosaurs | poiytrewq | zzzzzzzz | Novels }} ;Pragmatic example: Many (most?) sports are segregated by gender. In those sports, men and women either compete separately, or some in specified combination, e.g. in tennis a [[mixed doubles (tennis)|mixed doubles]] team must consist of one man and one woman. [[WP:Cat gender]] therefore allows the categories for players of those sports to be sub-divided by gender: one category for men, and one for women. One such divide is [[:Category:Male boxers]]/[[:Category:Women boxers]]. [[:Category:Estonian boxers]] has a subcategory for [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], but since there are as yet no en.wikipedia articles on women boxers from Estonia, we do not yet have a [[:Category:Estonian women boxers]]. So on [[:Category:Estonian male boxers]], there is: * {{tlx|Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} → {{Category see also if exists|Estonian women boxers}} == {{anchor|Warning|warning}}Warning messages == If none of the listed categories currently exists, then a warning message is displayed when the page is being [[Help:Show preview|previewed]]: Template:Category see also if exists — no output, because none of the categories currently exists. This warning is displayed just below the "Preview" heading, and just ''above'' the page preview area. It is not displayed when the page has been saved ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}} – includes a fallback category which is tried if the first does not exist *{{tl|Category if exists}} – conditionally adds a parent category *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Variadic templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
